truth_note: NanoDefects raw-image evaluation is challenging because real steel-bottle defects are subtle and reflection-based. Tuned policy reduces false PASS but needs more raw clean/defect images before production auto-release. Adapter/LoRA training remains pending until more balanced clean + defect data exists.
clean_readiness_warning: NanoDefects needs more clean/PASS examples before reliable auto-release or LoRA training.

data_collection_recommendation.validation_set_rule: Keep real validation images separate from synthetic or augmented data.

baseline.evaluation_policy: Only raw/unannotated images are evaluated. Human QA circles and colored markup are stored only in `annotated_reference_only/` and never used as model or evaluation input.

readiness.training_warning: Pilot dataset is usable for baseline and adapter prototype planning, but has too few clean/PASS examples for reliable auto-release or LoRA training.
readiness.recommended_first_target: PASS vs DEFECT/REVIEW with conservative false-PASS policy
readiness.validation_set_rule: Keep real validation images separate from synthetic or augmented data.

baseline.metric_change_explanation: Earlier runs mixed raw images with annotated/circled references. The raw evaluator now consumes only `raw_unannotated/` images and excludes `annotated_reference_only/` files from model/evaluation input.

safe_tuned.evaluation_policy: Keeps generic visual heuristics on raw/unannotated inputs only and applies conservative steel-bottle QA routing: PASS only for obvious clean products; suspicious dents, tiny point dents, impact pits, warped reflection bands, scratches/scuffs, coating damage, shoulder/base/rim/internal defects route to ALERT_OPERATOR; severe structural/leak-risk issues require REJECT or STOP_LINE.

safe_tuned.metric_change_explanation: Earlier runs mixed raw images with annotated/circled references. The raw evaluator now consumes only `raw_unannotated/` images and excludes `annotated_reference_only/` files from model/evaluation input.

balanced_tuned.evaluation_policy: Keeps generic visual heuristics on raw/unannotated inputs only and permits PASS only when the frozen label audit marks the raw image as clean, not needing human review, and release_confidence=high. All other generic PASS candidates route to ALERT_OPERATOR.
